titleZh: Cropr：潜力无限的激光除草机器人
summaryZh: 本文介绍了荷兰初创公司Cropr推出的自主激光除草机器人Weedr，该机器人采用蓝色二极管激光控制杂草，已在菊苣田作业。首批5台机器人已售出并投入田间使用。文章从技术特点、作业效果和商业化进展等方面进行了简要分析，展示了激光除草在精准农业中的潜力。
featuredReason: 激光除草技术代表了精准农业中非化学除草的前沿方向，虽当前主要应用于大田作物，但其自动化、AI视觉识别与精准作业理念对智慧畜牧中的草场管理、饲料作物种植同样具有借鉴意义。
contentFull: Cropr: laser weeder with potential 09-07 | UncategorizedLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintThe Cropr Weedr is a Dutch autonomous laser weeder that uses blue diode light to control weeds. Photos: Lucas van de Weijercropr is a new Dutch manufacturer of laser weeders. This season, the company has the first 5 robots operating in the field, all already sold to growers. A good moment for Future Farming to take a look at the robot. The first thing that stands out about the light-blue box driving across the chicory field is the smell of burnt plants behind the robot. The Weedr robot has been operating in chicory since this year. Quite an achievement, considering the company did not yet exist 2 years ago. cropr waLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint Lucas van de Weijer Future Farming robot expertadLEARN MORE Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
Cropr是一家荷兰新型激光除草机制造商。本季，该公司首批5台机器人已在田间作业，且全部售予种植户。对于《未来农业》而言，这是审视该机器人的好时机。

在菊苣田里行驶的浅蓝色箱体最引人注目的特点，是机器人身后飘来的植物烧焦气味。Weedr机器人自今年起一直在菊苣田中作业。考虑到该公司两年前还不存在，这算得上是一项相当了不起的成就。
author: Lucas van de Weijer
contentHtml: cropr is a new Dutch manufacturer of laser weeders. This season, the company has the first 5 robots operating in the field, all already sold to growers.
